## Target branch: `develop`

> All pull requests should target the `develop` branch — not `main`.
> `main` is the release branch and only receives merges from `release/X.Y.Z`
> branches. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full branching
> model.
